author: rachel.moore
text: Team — we NEED to hire Jordan. They're exactly what we need for the platform team. Strong system design, production experience, great references. Let's not overthink this.

author: dave.wilson
text: Jordan was really impressive on the system design round. Only hiccup was the distributed consensus question — struggled with Raft vs Paxos tradeoffs. But the architecture instincts are solid.

author: lisa.chen
text: For what it's worth, Sam's code review round was exceptional. Caught a subtle race condition that I almost missed myself. Very detail-oriented and methodical.

author: emily.zhang
text: Full transparency — I noticed Sam and Dave went to the same university (Stanford). Just flagging for the committee so we're aware of any potential affinity bias in Dave's assessment.

author: mike.taylor
text: I stand by my no-hire on Jordan. It's not about technical skills — those are fine. Jordan just didn't click with the team vibe. You can't teach culture fit.

author: rachel.moore
text: Sam is good but Jordan has 2 more years of experience and has actually built distributed systems at scale. Let's not let perfect be the enemy of good — we have a competing offer deadline.

author: dave.wilson
text: We should also consider team composition. We don't have anyone with Jordan's distributed systems background right now. That's a real gap. Sam is more of a generalist.

author: sarah.kim
text: Heads up all — Sprint Planning has been moved to Thursday 10am. This is mandatory for all engineering leads. Please update your calendars.

author: lisa.chen
text: Has Priya submitted her feedback? She interviewed Sam on the technical deep dive. I don't see her scorecard in the thread.

author: rachel.moore
text: Priya is OOO until tomorrow. We should proceed with what we have — we can't wait given Jordan's timeline. 4 scorecards per candidate should be enough.
